problem: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient
hypothesis: If Dopamine/serotonin reuptake inhibition with specificity is applied to alone, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 13 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
